hero.desc: We design, build, and ship production-grade software — web platforms, mobile apps, and AI automation — that helps businesses, financial institutions, and public organizations cut operating costs, move faster, and scale with confidence.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Software Engineering Built Around Business Outcomes
services.desc: We offer end-to-end software services engineered to lower operating costs, remove manual work, and give your business room to scale.
services.customSoftwareDesc: Purpose-built systems that replace spreadsheets and manual processes with software mapped to how your business actually runs.
services.webAppsDesc: Fast, secure, and responsive web platforms engineered to convert visitors and support your team's daily operations.
services.mobileAppsDesc: Native and cross-platform iOS and Android apps built on clean architecture, so they stay maintainable as your user base grows.
services.aiSolutionsDesc: AI-powered workflows and agents that eliminate repetitive manual work and free your team to focus on higher-value tasks.
services.cloudDesc: Cloud architecture and system integrations that keep your infrastructure reliable, secure, and ready for enterprise scale.

why.title: Why Choose NinuSoft?
why.subtitle: Engineering Discipline That Reduces Your Risk

features.businessFocusedDesc: Every technical decision is measured against your business goals, not novelty for its own sake.
features.scalableDesc: Built on Clean Architecture and SOLID principles, so your software grows with your business instead of holding it back.
features.modernTechDesc: Production-proven frameworks and architectures, the same standards used to build banking and telecom-grade applications.
features.secureDesc: Security and data protection considered from day one, not bolted on after launch.
features.fastDeliveryDesc: Agile delivery cycles that get a working product in front of your users faster, without cutting corners on quality.
features.longTermDesc: Ongoing support, maintenance, and iteration — we stay accountable for your software after launch, not just at delivery.

about.title: Engineering Discipline, Rooted in Nineveh
about.story: NinuSoft was founded in Mosul, Nineveh, on the belief that world-class software engineering doesn't require relocating to a tech hub. Nineveh has a deep, underused pool of engineering talent — we exist to put that talent to work building the software that businesses, banks, and public institutions actually depend on. We combine international engineering standards — Clean Architecture, SOLID principles, automated testing, and CI/CD — with a founding team that has shipped production software for telecom operators and financial institutions. Clients choose NinuSoft because we treat every engagement with the same discipline as mission-critical, regulated software, whether the project is a small business tool or an enterprise system.

founder.name: Ahmed Mones
founder.bio: Ahmed founded NinuSoft after five years engineering the systems that Iraq's telecom and banking sectors run on — architecting Fastlink Telecom's flagship mobile app from scratch, building a digitization platform used by hundreds of points-of-sale nationwide, and delivering production features for First Iraqi Bank's transaction app while at Gateway ICT Solutions. Alongside client work, he led Ninevah University's Google Developer Student Club and has personally mentored 45+ junior developers in clean architecture and production engineering practices. He founded NinuSoft to bring that same enterprise-grade discipline to businesses and institutions building their next software system.

projects.title: Hindam Customer App
projects.desc: Privacy-first native Android app for real-time tailoring and laundry order tracking via QR code scanning, without signing in.
projects.challenge: Tailoring and dry-cleaning shops had no way to give customers real-time order status, resulting in constant "is my order ready?" phone calls that pulled staff off the floor.
projects.solution: A privacy-first Android app that lets customers scan the QR code on their receipt to track status instantly, with zero sign-in or account creation required.
projects.impact: Eliminates status-inquiry calls for partner shops and gives customers a self-service way to track orders end to end.
projects.details: A consumer-focused native Android app designed with a strict Clean Architecture and MVI/MVVM flow. Utilizes Jetpack Compose for a highly responsive, localized interface. Customers can scan the QR code printed on their physical receipt to instantly monitor their order status (Pending, In Progress, Ready, Delivered), review comprehensive payment details (total, paid, and remaining balance), and access operator contact details and location. The app is completely privacy-first, requiring no sign-in, account creation, or password input.
features: Zero-friction tracking: Scan receipt QR code or enter Order ID manually
Real-time status updates (Pending, In Progress, Ready for collection, Delivered)
Comprehensive invoice view (services, quantity, pricing, paid, and remaining balance)
Quick access to shop details (name, contact number, and location)
No login required: Privacy-first design with no sign-in or data collection
Highly responsive Material 3 UI with smooth shimmer/skeleton loading states

projects.title: Hindam Manager App
projects.desc: Offline-first shop management app for tailors and dry cleaners with Bluetooth thermal printing, customer measurement history, and cloud sync.
projects.challenge: Shop owners relied on paper order books and manual receipts, losing customer measurement history and struggling with unreliable internet connectivity.
projects.solution: An offline-first Android app that lets staff create orders, manage customer profiles, and print thermal receipts with zero internet dependency, syncing automatically once connectivity returns.
projects.impact: Replaces paper-based operations entirely and keeps shops running without interruption during connectivity outages, common in the region.
projects.details: An enterprise-grade native Android shop management app built using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose under Clean Architecture guidelines. Operates fully offline using Room DB and synchronizes securely with Supabase. Enables managers and staff to create orders, manage customer profiles along with detailed measurement history, handle support tickets, and print physical receipts via Bluetooth thermal printers (supporting both 58mm and 80mm layouts). Includes a setup wizard to customize workflows for tailoring, laundry, or combined services, and features automated Play Store publishing via Gradle Play Publisher (GPP).
features: Offline-first capability: Create orders and add clients without an internet connection
Seamless cloud sync: Automatic database synchronization once connection is restored
Bluetooth thermal printing: Direct pairing to print receipts with tracking QR codes
Customer profiles: Organize contact logs and custom measurement history
Flexible shop customization: Set up workflows for tailoring, dry-cleaning, or both
Automated CI/CD: Release pipelines via GPP with localized release notes

projects.title: First Iraqi Bank (FIB) App
projects.desc: Large-scale personal banking transaction app — production features delivered while at Gateway ICT Solutions, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
projects.challenge: A large-scale banking app needed continuous feature development and legacy component maintenance without disrupting a live financial transaction system.
projects.solution: Maintained legacy XML components while developing robust new features using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, working under the reliability standards required of financial software.
projects.impact: Contributed production-grade features to a personal banking app handling real financial transactions at national scale.
projects.details: Contributed to the First Iraqi Bank (FIB) app, a large-scale personal banking transaction application, by maintaining legacy XML components and developing robust new features using Kotlin and Compose. This entry reflects professional experience delivered while employed at Gateway ICT Solutions, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
features: Production feature development on a live financial transaction system
Legacy XML component maintenance alongside new Compose UI
Delivered under financial-grade reliability and stability requirements

projects.title: Customer Complaint Handler (CCH)
projects.desc: Real-time 4G/LTE network monitoring tool for telecom field engineers — professional experience, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
projects.challenge: Network professionals needed real-time visibility into 4G/LTE cell performance data in the field, without relying on desktop monitoring tools.
projects.solution: Architected and built a native Android app from scratch using Kotlin and Compose, giving engineers live cell information directly in the field.
projects.impact: Gave telecom network teams real-time diagnostic data on-site, speeding up issue resolution.
projects.details: Architected and built the Customer Complaint Handler (CCH) app from scratch using Kotlin and Compose, enabling network professionals to monitor 4G/LTE cell info in real-time. This entry reflects professional experience delivered while employed at Gateway ICT Solutions, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
features: Real-time 4G/LTE cell information monitoring
Built for field use by network engineers
Clean Architecture for long-term maintainability

projects.title: Fastlink App
projects.desc: Flagship telecom consumer app, rebuilt from scratch on Compose Multiplatform — professional experience as Lead Software Engineer, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
projects.challenge: Fastlink's flagship consumer app needed a full architectural rebuild for long-term scalability and maintainability.
projects.solution: Architected and rebuilt the flagship app from scratch using Compose Multiplatform (CMP) on a scalable, reusable codebase.
projects.impact: Replaced a legacy consumer telecom app with a scalable rebuild serving Fastlink's nationwide subscriber base.
projects.details: As Lead Software Engineer at Fastlink Telecom, architected and rebuilt the flagship Fastlink app from scratch using Compose Multiplatform (CMP) with scalable architecture and clean, reusable code practices. This entry reflects professional experience delivered while employed at Fastlink Telecom, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
features: Full architectural rebuild of a nationwide consumer telecom app
Built on Compose Multiplatform for long-term scalability
App distribution managed across Firebase, Google Play Console, and Huawei AppGallery

projects.title: FastSIM
projects.desc: Nationwide SIM-sales digitization platform for hundreds of agents and points-of-sale — professional experience, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
projects.challenge: Hundreds of SIM sales agents nationwide were still relying on manual, paper-based processes to register and sell SIM cards.
projects.solution: Engineered FastSIM from the ground up in Jetpack Compose to digitize the entire SIM card sales workflow.
projects.impact: Digitized SIM sales for hundreds of agents and points-of-sale nationwide, replacing paper-based processes.
projects.details: Engineered the FastSIM app from scratch using Jetpack Compose to digitize SIM card sales, supporting hundreds of agents and points-of-sale nationwide. This entry reflects professional experience delivered while employed at Fastlink Telecom, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
features: Digitized SIM sales workflow for hundreds of agents and points-of-sale
Built for nationwide field agent use
App distribution managed across Firebase, Google Play Console, and Huawei AppGallery

projects.title: Drive-Test
projects.desc: Field telemetry app for network technicians — professional experience delivered at Gateway ICT Solutions, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
projects.challenge: Field technicians needed a reliable way to capture and report real-time 4G/LTE network telemetry data while on-site.
projects.solution: Built a purpose-made Android app in Kotlin and Jetpack Compose to capture, process, and display live network telemetry for field use.
projects.impact: Gave field technicians the tooling to diagnose and report network issues directly from the field.
projects.details: Built the Drive-Test application using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose to capture, process, and display real-time network telemetry for field technicians. This entry reflects professional experience delivered while employed at Gateway ICT Solutions, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
features: Real-time network telemetry capture and processing
Built for daily use by field technicians
Stable, production-monitored release cycle

projects.desc: Field support and telemetry app for network technicians — professional experience delivered at Gateway ICT Solutions, not a NinuSoft-owned product.
projects.challenge: Field technicians needed a dedicated support tool to capture and report network issues alongside telemetry data.
projects.solution: Built a purpose-made Android app in Kotlin and Jetpack Compose to capture, process, and display real-time network telemetry and support data for field use.
projects.impact: Gave field technicians a dedicated support tool for diagnosing and reporting network issues directly from the field.
projects.details: Built the FastSupport application using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose to capture, process, and display real-time network telemetry for field technicians. This entry reflects professional experience delivered while employed at Gateway ICT Solutions, not a NinuSoft-owned product.

Built for daily use by field technicians
Stable, production-monitored release cycle

projects.title: Fingerprint Lib
projects.desc: Open-source Kotlin Android library for seamless fingerprint scanner integration.
projects.challenge: Android teams integrating fingerprint scanners typically rebuild the same low-level image capture and processing logic from scratch.
projects.solution: An open-source, Kotlin-based Android library that handles fingerprint scanner integration with efficient image capture and processing out of the box.
projects.impact: Freely available on GitHub for any Android team that needs fingerprint scanner integration without reinventing the low-level implementation.
projects.details: An open-source Kotlin-based Android library for seamless fingerprint scanner integration with efficient image capture and processing.
features: Efficient fingerprint image capture and processing
Drop-in integration for Android apps
Maintained as an open-source project on GitHub

projects.title: Expo-eSIM Lib
projects.desc: Open-source Kotlin native module for eSIM activation and QR scanning in React Native (Expo) apps.
projects.challenge: React Native / Expo apps had no straightforward, native-quality way to support eSIM activation and QR-based provisioning.
projects.solution: A Kotlin native module that brings eSIM activation and QR code scanning to Expo apps with minimal integration effort.
projects.impact: Open-sourced on GitHub, giving React Native teams native eSIM support without writing platform code themselves.
projects.details: An open-source Kotlin native module for eSIM activation and QR code scanning, for seamless integration into React Native (Expo) apps.
features: Native eSIM activation flow for Expo apps
Built-in QR code scanning for provisioning
Maintained as an open-source project on GitHub

projects.title: Quick-Mailer
projects.desc: High-performance Python email library with 51,000+ cumulative PyPI downloads.
projects.challenge: Python developers needed a lightweight, fast library for MIME email delivery with multi-recipient routing and secure SMTP, without heavyweight dependencies.
projects.solution: A high-performance, open-source Python email library maintained on PyPI, supporting fast MIME delivery, multi-recipient routing, and secure SMTP connectivity.
projects.impact: Adopted widely enough to reach over 51,000 cumulative downloads on PyPI.
projects.details: A high-performance Python email library supporting fast MIME delivery, multi-recipient routing, and secure SMTP connectivity; maintained on PyPI with over 51,000 cumulative downloads.
features: Fast MIME email delivery
Multi-recipient routing
Secure SMTP connectivity
51,000+ cumulative downloads on PyPI
